faq.title: FAQ
faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about our online food ordering platform, payments, reservations, and restaurant management tools.

q1.question: What is an Online Ordering System?
q1.answer: An online ordering system allows customers to browse menus, place orders, and make secure payments directly through your website or mobile device.

q2.question: Can customers order without downloading an app?
q2.answer: Yes. Customers can order directly from your website by simply scanning a QR code or visiting your ordering page.

q3.question: Does the system support online payments?
q3.answer: Yes. The platform supports UPI, Credit Cards, Debit Cards, Net Banking, Wallets, and other secure payment gateways.

q4.question: Can I manage orders in real time?
q4.answer: Absolutely. Restaurant staff can view, accept, reject, and track orders instantly from the admin dashboard.

q5.question: Does the system support table reservations?
q5.answer: Yes. Customers can reserve tables online and receive instant booking confirmations.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.description: Your privacy matters to us. This Privacy Policy explains how Liefro collects, uses, and protects your information.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.body: Liefro ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our website, products, and services.

sections.title: 2. Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as your name, email address, phone number, business details, and payment information. We also collect usage data, device information, and cookies to improve your experience.

sections.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use the information we collect to provide, operate, and maintain our services, process transactions, communicate with you, improve our platform, and ensure security.

sections.title: 4. Information Sharing
sections.body: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information with trusted service providers who help us operate our platform, comply with legal obligations, or protect our rights.

sections.title: 5. Data Security
sections.body: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

sections.title: 6. Your Rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information. You can also object to or restrict certain processing activities. To exercise your rights, contact us using the details below.

sections.title: 7. Cookies & Tracking
sections.body: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience, analyze usage, and personalize content. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.

sections.title: 8. Data Retention
sections.body: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy or as required by law.

sections.title: 9. Third-Party Services
sections.body: Our platform may contain links to third-party websites or integrate with third-party services. We are not responsible for their privacy practices.

sections.title: 10. Children's Privacy
sections.body: Liefro is not intended for children under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

sections.title: 11. Changes to This Policy
sections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes by posting the new policy on this page with an updated effective date.

sections.title: 12. Contact Us
sections.body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

termsConditions.title: Terms & Conditions
termsConditions.description: These Terms & Conditions govern your use of Liefro's website and services. Please read them carefully.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By accessing or using Liefro's website or services, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions and our Privacy Policy.

sections.title: 2. Description of Services
sections.body: Liefro provides an all-in-one platform for restaurants that includes ordering, POS, marketing, analytics, and other related services.

sections.title: 3. User Accounts
sections.body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

sections.title: 4. Acceptable Use
sections.body: You agree to use Liefro only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You must not use our services in any way that could harm, disable, or impair our platform.

sections.title: 5. Payments & Billing
sections.body: Some features require payment. All fees are stated in our pricing plans. Payments are non-refundable except as required by law or as stated in our refund policy.

sections.title: 6. Intellectual Property
sections.body: All content, trademarks, logos, and software on Liefro are the property of Liefro and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws.

sections.title: 7. Third-Party Services
sections.body: Our platform may integrate with third-party services. We are not responsible for their content, policies, or practices.

sections.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: Liefro is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of our services.

sections.title: 9. Indemnification
sections.body: You agree to indemnify and hold Liefro harmless from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from your use of the services or violation of these terms.

sections.title: 10. Termination
sections.body: We may suspend or terminate your access to Liefro at any time if you violate these Terms or misuse our services.

sections.title: 11. Governing Law
sections.body: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which Liefro is established.

sections.title: 12. Changes to Terms
sections.body: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of our services after changes means you accept the new Terms.

sections.title: 13. Contact Us
sections.body: If you have any questions about these Terms & Conditions, please contact us at:

services.description: Liefro brings all the tools you need to streamline operations, delight customers, and grow your restaurant business.
services.sectionTitle: Everything You Need, All in One Place
services.sectionDescription: Explore our comprehensive suite of solutions designed to run your restaurant smarter and faster.

items.title: Menu Management
items.description: Update items, prices & availability instantly across all platforms.

items.title: Online Ordering
items.description: Launch your branded online ordering system for web & mobile.

items.title: QR Ordering & Pay
items.description: Let customers scan, order, and pay directly from their table.

items.title: POS System
items.description: Powerful POS for dine-in, splits, discounts and more.

items.title: Reservation System
items.description: Smart table booking system to manage reservations effortlessly.

items.title: Printer Integration
items.description: Auto-print orders to kitchen, bar, or multiple stations.

items.title: Marketing & Growth
items.description: Reach more customers and grow your business with smart marketing.

items.title: Analytics Dashboard
items.description: Track performance and make smarter decisions with real-time data.

items.title: Technical Support
items.description: 7-day help in 6 languages, whenever you need it.

items.title: Website Development
items.description: Custom websites built for restaurants that drive orders.

items.title: Mobile App Development
items.description: Native iOS & Android apps for your restaurant brand.

items.title: Google Business & SEO
items.description: Get discovered locally and drive direct orders.
